subject: feat(builder): add read-only example form at /forms/example
body:
Users can now view a pre-built example form (Project Discovery / Intake)
in the builder UI without being able to modify it. This helps new users
understand how the form builder works before creating their own forms.

- Add readOnly state + mutation guards to formStore
- Add /forms/example route rendering BuilderPage in read-only mode
- Load SAMPLE_FORM into builder when visiting example route
- Show "Example Form" title + "Read-only" badge in header
- Hide save/create button, embed/responses/preview links
- Disable drag-and-drop in palette and canvas
- Hide drag handles, duplicate, and remove buttons on field cards
- Disable all property panel inputs (text, select, checkbox, etc.)
- Hide add/remove page buttons, disable page rename
- Disable OptionsEditor reorder/remove/add controls
- Disable ConditionBuilder toggle/edit/remove controls
- Add example form card on home page with dashed border + read-only badge

Tags: feature, builder, example, read-only, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: example-form
Semver: minor
